data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Email confirmations' as stated in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the actual sending of email confirmations after a booking is made. While the booking process is detailed, the absence of any evidence regarding email confirmations indicates a gap in requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming that email confirmations are sent after bookings.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
